title: 3D Armor Stand Item
description: A texture pack that uses the armor stand 3d model as item instead of using the vanilla 2d texture
body:
_A texture pack that uses the armor stand 3d model as item instead of using the vanilla 2d texture_

**This texture pack allows you to display the Armor Stand item in 3d using it's own model instead of using the Vanilla 2d texture**

It also displaying it in 3d on the ground or in main hand
